productDisplayName: UCB Men's Johny Collar With Two Tone Dark Blue T-shirt

The dark peach tipping on the cuffs and collar and the embroidered Big Ben logo on the left chest enhances your regal style. The ribbed sleeve hems contour your well-toned arms perfectly, while the vented hem offers a comfortable Fit.
